label: Bouncing logo
summary: A logo that bounces around the viewport, waiting for the corner hit.
era: The DVD screensaver logo that hypnotized a generation.

classes.name: rs-dvd
classes.role: the bouncing logo chip (when the widget creates its own)

options.name: target
options.note: an element to bounce; otherwise a default chip

a11y: Decoration: aria-hidden, pointer-events:none. Under prefers-reduced-motion it parks in a corner and holds still.
